notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Zack Gelof. Xander Bogaerts to 2nd. Xander Bogaerts advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Zack Gelof.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Michael King. Jonah Heim scores. Jeff McNeil to 3rd. Henry Bolte to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar grounds into a double play, shortstop Alika Williams to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Fernando Tatis Jr. out at 2nd. Miguel Andujar out at 1st.
